Authors and Citation

Authors

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Salerno, Stephen, Miao, Jiacheng, Afiaz, Awan, Hoffman, Kentaro, Neufeld, Anna, Lu, Qiongshi, McCormick, H T, Leek, T J (2025). “ipd: An R Package for Conducting Inference on Predicted Data.” Bioinformatics, 41(2), btaf055. doi:10.1093/bioinformatics/btaf055.

  title = {ipd: An R Package for Conducting Inference on Predicted Data},

On this page

Developed by Stephen Salerno, Jiacheng Miao, Awan Afiaz, Kentaro Hoffman, Jesse Gronsbell, Jianhui Gao, David Cheng, Anna Neufeld, Qiongshi Lu, Tyler H McCormick, Jeffrey T Leek.
